name: systems-thinking-toolkit
description: Systems thinking toolkit grounded in Dennis Sherwood, Seeing the Forest for the Trees (2002). 8 functional skills + 1 router after v0.4 R3 CLD-centric restructure. Carry-1 cld-craft (prose → fully-annotated Mermaid CLD; 12 hygiene rules + Rule 7 fuzzy elevation + R/B classification + Sterman uniflow discipline) feeds downstream: cld-archetypes (limits-to-growth + variance/target/action), cld-overlay (outward stakeholder straddle), team-mental-model (inward convergence + leadership energy proxies), strategy-lever-and-cascade (3-timescale ambition → levers), simulation-modeling (CLD → stock-flow, text-only). Plus auxiliary V1-weak innovaction-martian-test + manager-personality-quadrant. v0.5 adds zh-TW / JA symptom-phrase coverage and English-node + native-caption language policy. Distilled via tsundoku:book-distill RIA-TV++ pipeline. システム思考ツールキット — Sherwood 2002 ベース。系統思考工具組 — Sherwood 2002 為本。
